_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: NF1 head circumference Z scores computed using LMSz and CHOP charts were highly correlated (intraclass correlation coefficient (ICC) = 0.97; P < 0.0001; mean difference between LMSz and CHOP Z scores = 0.0038
details: LMSz and CHOP charts produced highly correlated NF1 head circumference Z scores (ICC = 0.97; P < 0.0001; mean difference = 0.0038; standard deviation = 0.22)
